title: Update reset-password.blade.php with design system styling
contract: Replace generic Bootstrap/inline styles in reset-password.blade.php with nothing-tech design system classes: Form inputs use .input-base, Submit button .btn-primary, Links .btn-secondary, Cards/containers use .card, Typography uses CSS custom properties (var(--type-*)), Colors use CSS custom properties (var(--color-*)), Spacing uses CSS custom properties (var(--space-*)).
verify: npm run build && grep -q '.input-base\|.btn-primary\|.card' resources/views/auth/passwords/reset.blade.php && echo 'Design system classes applied'
